name: scheduling_service
description: What customers can book. Generic primitive — store fields generic, render labels per scheduling_settings.vertical_preset (e.g. 'Service' / 'Stylist' for salons, 'Lesson' / 'Tutor' for tutoring).

name: scheduling_resource
description: Who/what provides the service (staff member, room, piece of equipment). google_calendar_id null means no Calendar mirror for this resource — booking still works DB-only.

name: scheduling_resource_service
description: M:N — which resources can perform which services. resource_id + service_id are the natural key (BFFless still assigns a row id).

name: scheduling_working_hours
description: Day-of-week schedule. Multiple rows per (resource_id, day_of_week) = split shifts (e.g. 09:00-13:00 + 14:00-18:00 with a lunch break). resource_id null = applies to all resources (site-wide).

name: scheduling_time_off
description: Blocked windows. Per-resource for vacations; resource_id null = site-wide holiday/closure.

name: scheduling_booking
description: The actual appointment. DB-canonical — Google Calendar is a mirror, not the source of truth. reschedule_token = booking row id (used by /bookings/manage).

fields.name: user_id
fields.description: SuperTokens user.id of the signed-in customer; null for anonymous bookings. Used by GET /api/scheduling/my-bookings to filter to the caller's bookings.

name: scheduling_settings
description: Singleton site-wide behavior config. Provision a single row at first run; pipelines fetch via pageSize=1.

name: scheduling_admin_user
description: Per-site allowlist of users who can edit scheduling business rules (services / stylists / hours / settings). Bootstrap via POST /api/scheduling/admin/claim while empty; locks after first claim. Distinct from BFFless platform admin (which gates content edits + build pipelines via /api/admin/toolbar).
